do: Use the primary blue (#4a90e2) as the dominant color with white text for maximum impact and brand recognition
Emphasize the 'undetectable' and 'real-time assistance' value propositions prominently in headlines using EB Garamond font
Include clean mockups of the Mac interface with rounded corners to showcase the product in action during meetings
Use professional, confident tone focusing on instant AI assistance and seamless meeting enhancement
dont: Avoid dark backgrounds or dark mode visuals - stick to the light aesthetic with sky blue (#87ceeb) backgrounds
Don't use generic stock photos of meetings - focus on actual product interface and real-time assistance features
Avoid overly technical jargon - keep copy accessible while maintaining the smart, professional positioning
Don't use sharp corners or harsh design elements - maintain the rounded, modern visual style throughout
